replenishment_policy.instruction: If fewer than minimum_todo_tasks remain, generate new tasks from: 1) docs/game_design.md AI system, 2) unimplemented ball types, 3) missing AI behaviors, 4) game modes, 5) arenas, 6) skills. Focus on AI improvements first.

autonomous_loop_policy.selection_rule: Choose the first todo task. Prioritize AI-related tasks.
autonomous_loop_policy.anti_stall_rule: Never ask user what to do. Generate tasks from game_design.md AI system.
autonomous_loop_policy.failure_rule: If CI fails, fix before new features.
autonomous_loop_policy.idea_generation: After completing a task, read docs/game_design.md AI section and suggest 2-3 new AI tasks.

tasks.title: Implement Ball Brain architecture
tasks.description: Create the core AI system: BallBrain class with 4 layers: Perception (find enemies/allies/boosters), Emotion (fear/rage/greed based on HP and situation), Decision (choose strategy), Action (execute behavior). Each ball gets its own Brain instance.
acceptance: Each ball has its own Brain instance
Brain processes perception -> emotion -> decision -> action
Basic decisions work: chase, flee, attack

tasks.title: Implement Perception system
tasks.description: Create Perception class that scans the world: finds nearby enemies, allies, boosters, traps. Calculates distances, threat levels, opportunity scores. Each ball has perception radius based on type.
acceptance: Perception finds all entities in radius
Perception radius varies by ball type

tasks.title: Implement Emotion system
tasks.description: Create Emotion class that models ball's emotional state: Fear (low HP), Rage (ally killed), Greed (sees booster), Cowardice (first hit), Heroism (ally in danger), Bloodlust (killed 2+ enemies). Emotions modify behavior.
acceptance: Emotions trigger based on correct conditions
Emotions modify behavior (fear = flee, rage = attack)

tasks.title: Implement Decision system
tasks.description: Create Decision class that evaluates options and chooses action: weighs threat level, opportunity, personality, emotional state. Returns best action: chase, flee, attack, use skill, collect booster, defend.
acceptance: Decisions are deterministic given same state

tasks.title: Implement Action execution system
tasks.description: Create Action class that executes chosen behavior: move to target, attack, use skill, flee, collect booster. Handles pathfinding, timing, and cooldowns.

tasks.title: Implement Personality system
tasks.description: Create Personality class that defines ball's character: aggressive, cautious, supportive, reckless, cunning. Each ball type has default personality. Personality influences decision weights.

tasks.title: Implement Chase behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves towards nearest enemy. Uses pathfinding to avoid obstacles. Stops when in attack range. Can be modified by fear (runs away) or greed (chases booster instead).
acceptance: Can be interrupted by higher priority

tasks.title: Implement Flee behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves away from nearest threat. Prioritizes moving towards allies or safe zones. Speed boost when fleeing. Can stop when safe.

tasks.title: Implement Attack behavior
tasks.description: Ball attacks when in range. Timing varies by ball type (fast for Scout, slow for Tank). Can chain attacks. Uses skill when available and optimal.

tasks.title: Implement Kite behavior
tasks.description: Ball maintains distance from enemy while attacking. Moves back when enemy approaches, attacks when enemy retreats. Used by Sniper and ranged types.

tasks.title: Implement Flank behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves behind enemy for bonus damage. Uses stealth (Ninja) or speed (Scout) to get behind. Attacks from behind for critical hit.

tasks.title: Implement Group Attack behavior
tasks.description: Multiple balls coordinate to attack same target. Balls signal intent and converge. Tank takes aggro, damage dealers attack, healer supports.

tasks.title: Implement Collect Booster behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves towards nearest booster. Ignores enemies when collecting (greed). Can be interrupted if enemy gets too close.

tasks.title: Implement Warrior AI profile
tasks.description: Warrior AI: aggressive personality, high attack priority, never flees, uses Wave Attack when 2+ enemies in front, charges into battle.
acceptance: Never flees even at low HP
Has unique battle cry on kill

tasks.title: Implement Scout AI profile
tasks.description: Scout AI: curious personality, seeks boosters, attacks weak enemies, flees from strong ones, uses Dash to escape or chase.

tasks.title: Implement Tank AI profile
tasks.description: Tank AI: brave personality, protects allies, uses Shield when taking damage, body blocks for healers, draws aggro.

tasks.title: Implement Healer AI profile
tasks.description: Healer AI: caring personality, follows wounded allies, heals them, avoids combat, uses heal on cooldown.

tasks.title: Implement Sniper AI profile
tasks.description: Sniper AI: cautious personality, maintains distance, uses Snipe from max range, kites enemies, avoids melee.

tasks.title: Implement Bomber AI profile
tasks.description: Bomber AI: reckless personality, seeks crowded enemy groups, uses Bomb when 3+ enemies nearby, suicide attacks.

tasks.title: Implement Ninja AI profile
tasks.description: Ninja AI: cunning personality, uses Stealth to approach, attacks from behind for critical, flees after attack, hit-and-run tactics.

tasks.title: Implement King AI profile
tasks.description: King AI: leader personality, stays behind allies, uses Command to buff team, targets low HP allies to boost, avoids direct combat.

tasks.title: Implement AI difficulty levels
tasks.description: Create difficulty system: Easy (slow reactions, simple decisions), Medium (normal), Hard (fast, optimal), Chaos (random, funny). Affects reaction time, decision quality, skill usage.
acceptance: Difficulty can be set per ball or globally

tasks.title: Implement Team coordination AI
tasks.description: Balls in same team share information: call out targets, request help, coordinate attacks. Tank signals to hold position, Healer calls for wounded, Sniper calls out threats.
acceptance: Call for help when low HP
